items.label: Back-arrow popup covers map nodes — replace with floating DOM box below player node
items.desc: Replaced canvas edge-label with a DOM .czb-back-popup div positioned below (or above/side) the anchor node. Viewport-aware: tries below first, falls back to above, then clamps. OK button triggers _crossZoneJump. MapScreen.js _updateCrossZoneBackPopup().

items.label: Back arrow from Map 2 first node puts player at random node, not boss node where Map 1 ended
items.desc: _getCrossZoneLink now calls GameState.getZoneNode(prev.id) to look up the last-visited node in the previous zone, falling back to zone.nodes[last] only if no saved position exists. MapScreen.js line ~114.

items.label: Hidden (fogged) map nodes still hoverable to reveal type/position
items.desc: _onHover now computes the fog revealed-set and skips any node not in it, preventing tooltip + visual hover on fogged tiles. MapScreen.js _onHover().

items.label: Fog-of-war should be active by default
items.desc: CharacterBuilderScreen._fogOfWar changed from false to true (new game default). gameState.js load migration changed from !!saved.fogOfWar to saved.fogOfWar !== false so old saves without the field get fog-on rather than fog-off.

items.label: .dg-screen doesn't go away after dungeon completed
items.desc: DungeonScreen had onLeave() but ScreenManager only calls onExit()/destroy(). Added onExit and destroy aliases that call removeEl(this._el).

items.label: .combat-screen becomes 0px tall mid-combat
items.desc: Added height:100%; min-height:100% to .combat-screen CSS rule in COMBAT_STYLES.

items.label: Victory screen overflows when many rewards
items.desc: Added max-height:90vh; overflow-y:auto to .cem-box so the victory modal scrolls instead of clipping.

items.label: Boss treasure drops 3 items — should be PICK 1 of 3
items.desc: Converted MapScreen._showBossChestModal from "Take All" to a pick-one UI: 3 buttons side-by-side, one click selects + closes. Only rarity colors on borders (no class-suggestion green). mm-box gets max-height/overflow-y.

items.label: Boss treasure pick-dialog borders should be rarity, not class suggestion
items.desc: Pick-one modal uses RAR_COLOR/RAR_BG maps keyed by rarity. No character-suggestion overlay rendered.

items.label: Achievement screen during combat doesn't pause; victory pops up over it
items.desc: Added onPause/onResume to CombatScreen. onPause saves and zeroes _speedMult. onResume restores it and drains _deferredVictory. _showVictoryModal defers if CombatScreen is not the stack top.

items.label: Boss intro splash shows old intro text in background; no auto-dismiss
items.desc: Removed 2s auto-dismiss timer from _showBossIntroSplash. HUD, potion belt, and log panel are hidden (visibility:hidden) while splash is up and restored on dismiss.

items.label: 500-fame guildmaster popup appears after quitting to menu
items.desc: TownScreen stores _fameEncounterModal reference. onExit/destroy removes it. Prevents modal from persisting over TitleScreen after GameMenuScreen._goToTitle() clears the stack.

items.label: Combat report "TOTAL HEAL 0.38999..." — too many digits
items.desc: Applied formatStat(...,'int') to totalDmg, totalHeal, totalMit, avgDps, per-row totals, source totals, and individual hit amounts in _buildCombatReportHtml.

items.label: Replace big E toggle button with Combat Settings pause menu
items.desc: Added "Combat Settings" button to pause menu. Sub-panel: show/hide DPS Meter (with Show Enemies sub-option), show/hide Combat Log (with Show Secondary Effects sub-option), Combat Captions toggle. Redirect note added in main Settings.

items.label: Combat captions overlap bottom HP bar
items.desc: Changed .cbt-captions bottom from 0 to 80px so captions sit above the .cbt-hud bar.

milestones.title: News flow + asset archive + release pipeline

items.label: public/news/ folder + Latest News widget
items.desc: public/news/*.md with YAML frontmatter; emit-news-index.cjs prebuild script writes index.json; Latest News widget on asset gallery (top 3 cards); news-archive.html with category filter. M302/M305/M306 starter entries added.

items.label: Versioned asset archive (snapshot per milestone)
items.desc: snapshot-assets.cjs wired into release.sh after game_meta.json update; idempotent (skips existing). data-overrides.html now probes snapshot manifests and presents working Restore from Snapshot M### dropdown with per-type and restore-all modes.

items.label: release.sh prompt for changelog category tags
items.desc: RELEASE_CATEGORY env var (feature/balance/bugfix/qol/art/infrastructure, comma-separated). Interactive prompt if unset and TTY; default to feature in non-interactive mode. Persisted to releases[N].categories in game_meta.json. parse-changelog-categories.cjs merges explicit tags into structured output.

items.label: Backward-compat notes on release
items.desc: BREAKING_CHANGES env var (pipe-delimited) persisted to releases[N].breakingChanges. emit-release-summary.cjs includes field. What's New splash renders Migration Notes section when non-empty. Retroactive notes added for M302/M305/M306/M307. Documented in public/docs/no-silent-shelving.md.

items.label: Number rounding audit
items.desc: Manual #16: floor int stats (HP/MP/STR/DEX/INT/WIS/CON/CHA, armor, damage); display floats with up to 2 decimals (crit chance shows 1.15%, not 13.000000001%). Apply across DPS meter + character stats. Multipliers, dodge %, resistances stay float; consider per-stat formatting helper.

items.label: Fame-locked appearance / weapon variety unlocks
items.desc: Long-term carrot; fame is invisible today. Fame counter in CharacterBuilder + TitleScreen badge. Appearances beyond slot 5 gate behind fame thresholds (100/250/500/1000/2000). Locked tiles greyed out with fame target tooltip.

items.label: Craftable unique items (recipe unlocks on boss kill)
items.desc: Bridge merchant/blacksmith/enchanter workflows. 5 per act.

items.label: Crafting recipe unlocks via lore-node exploration
items.desc: Make Blacksmith/Enchanter discovery dynamic instead of static stock. Manual #12: all basic/white recipes should unlock easily — gating is for higher tiers.

items.label: Boss-defeat cinematic dialog
items.desc: Capture story beat, not just combat. Leverage story; minimal boss dialog today.

items.label: Procedural challenge dungeon (infinite scaling)
items.desc: Manual #11: separate from in-game dungeons. Diablo-3/4 / PoE-delve style infinite scaling tiers. Random Act 1-5 enemies + twists. Replayable post-game content for build-testing.

items.label: Set items (24 sets total)
items.desc: Manual #10 (doubled per user): 12 low-tier (2-piece — Diablo-2 Sigon-style with powerful low-level modifiers), 8 mid-tier (3-piece), 4 endgame (4–5 piece). Sets have legendary effects on top of stat bonuses (e.g. Mage set: Magic Missile fires bonus AoE projectile at second target). Pre-determined effects, semi-random affix values per template (Sigon Shield always +5 STR but other affixes random).

items.label: Unique items (~24 across 5 acts)
items.desc: Rare items with a legendary effect (rarely multiple). Pre-determined effects; affixes may be pre-determined or random per template.

items.label: 40 new affixes (elemental combos, conditional triggers, set bonuses)
items.desc: Deepen itemization beyond the current ~30 affixes. Overlaps with sets — design together.

milestones.title: Multi-phase bosses + boss loot + hidden bosses + dialogue

items.label: Multi-phase boss fights
items.desc: HP checkpoints unlock new attack patterns. Generalize the Unraveler pattern to 3-5 other final bosses.

items.label: Boss-themed loot tables
items.desc: e.g. Unraveler always drops void-themed items. Memorable rewards for memorable fights.

items.label: Hidden boss encounters
items.desc: Gated by rare-loot-finds or stat thresholds. Easter eggs for completionists / speedrunners.

items.label: 8 new dialogue branches per act
items.desc: Gated on party comp / past choices. Replay value; story is mostly linear today.

items.label: Enemy spells
items.desc: Manual #7: add spells to selected enemies — basic monsters (esp. goblins) keep auto-attack. Reusable element-keyed FX assets (fire/ice/shadow/holy/nature) with monster-class tinting; fall back gracefully when art is missing. Bosses get wind-up spells interruptible by sufficient damage or dispel/spell-steal. Some boss buffs are stealable and can flip the tide of combat.

items.label: Blue-name champion modifiers
items.desc: Manual #8: Diablo-2-style champion prefixes — health regen, damage aura, fast, extra strong, etc. No new artwork; pure mechanical layer. Defer the "giant fiery mini-boss" idea to challenge tiles in a later milestone.

milestones.title: Gameplay batch 1: Combat additions + new node types

items.label: Companion level-sync option
items.desc: Scale companion to party avg. Manual #5: party average level should also be displayed on save game slots so you can quickly compare playthroughs.

items.label: Flee from combat (DEX check; failure costs gold)
items.desc: Recovery option early-act instead of auto-wipe.

items.label: Steal-buff mechanic (Rogue)
items.desc: Pull enemy buffs to self. New effect type; high-skill play.

items.label: Bleed-stack burst finisher skill
items.desc: Make bleed-focused builds rewarding beyond passive DoT.

items.label: Curse system (negative buff that spreads on death)
items.desc: Differentiate curses from poison/burn; Warlock identity.

items.label: Skill-check node (single attribute roll)
items.desc: Success/fail branches. Rewards stat investment.

items.label: Travelling merchant + minigame node-overlay system
items.desc: Travelling merchant stops on the path; one-time stock. Manual #9: generalize to a node-overlay system — random encounters can overlay an existing node OR appear between nodes. If overlaying, the node-click triggers the overlay first, THEN starts the underlying node encounter (do NOT let the user skip the underlying node — known bug on Node 1 of new maps). Includes positive (merchant), neutral (memory minigame), and hostile (bandit patrol) overlays. Ties into quest system.

items.label: DoT stacking modes per-spell
items.desc: Manual #6: Bleed, poison, and other DoTs each declare a stacking mode: per-source (each character independently up to N stacks — e.g. 2 rogues × 5 = 10), per-character (one stack per source), or global (one stack from any source). Tooltips read e.g. "Poison Dagger: applies up to 5 stacks of poison on target." Pick whichever mode best suits each spell.

items.label: Headless combat simulator API
items.desc: Spawn combatants, run N rounds, return stats. Currently Monte Carlo lives in scripts; expose as a clean Node API for Claude to call.

items.label: Batch rebalance reports (parallel + CSV)
items.desc: Test 50 skill tweaks in parallel, compare win-rates. Currently serial.

items.label: Regression alerts on rebalance
items.desc: Alert if Act win-rate drops > threshold. Manual #15: per-act configurable thresholds (e.g. Act 5 25% floor vs Act 1 10%). Config file: scripts/regression-thresholds.json, hand-editable.

items.label: Encounter difficulty rating
items.desc: Predicted win-rate, flag too-hard fights. Uses simulator.

items.label: Item-generation validator
items.desc: Every affix rolls within bounds. Catch balance bugs early.

items.label: Affix coverage report
items.desc: Which affixes never appear in Act 1-2 loot. Identify dead content.

items.label: Save-file load-tester (auto-snapshot per milestone)
items.desc: Load 100 random saves, check for crashes. Manual #17: auto-save a game per act after each milestone build under assets/references/emberveil/saves/regression/M###/ for regression testing.

items.label: Loot distribution audit
items.desc: Drop chance per act; flag rare over-drop. Manual #18: include merchant, guild hall, black market shop pools — they're part of the economy too.

items.label: Combat-log replayer (export-only)
items.desc: Save fight trace JSON, replay visually on demand. Manual #13: no repo bloat — keep traces in localStorage with manual export button. Loader takes pasted JSON or file upload.

items.label: Status-effect interaction matrix
items.desc: All 2-effect combos, computed outcomes. Identify unintended synergies.

items.label: Automated end-to-end playthrough
items.desc: Seeded RNG, full Act 1-5 run, softlock detection. Smoke test after balance changes.

items.label: Skill interaction simulator (skill A + skill B combo)
items.desc: skill-sim.html — two skill pickers from getSkills(), side-by-side effect panels, combo heuristic (stacking/consume/DPS/neutral), and "Run 100 Combats" in-browser sim.

items.label: Affix interaction matrix page
items.desc: affix-matrix.html — visual grid from getAffixes(), heuristic interaction types (stack/conflict/multiply/independent), color-coded, click-to-detail modal, pool filter.

items.label: Spell catalog: side-by-side skill comparison
items.desc: spell-catalog.html — added Compare mode button; pick up to 4 skills, click "Show Comparison" for a horizontal stats table (cooldown, MP, damage type, talents, upgrades).

items.label: Asset-pipeline trace tool
items.desc: asset-pipeline-trace.html — static knowledge map of 13 scripts (release.sh, optimize_audio, emit-game-data, build-manifest, clean-manifest, etc.) with inputs/outputs/trigger. Search + trigger filter.

items.label: image-review-manifest deprecation pass
items.desc: scripts/clean-image-review-manifest.cjs — removes missing-file entries and duplicates. Ran: 917 → 782 entries, 1655.7 KB → 1622.3 KB (135 stale removed). Deprecation notice added to image-review.html.

items.label: character-redesign archive
items.desc: approve.cjs now archives displaced frames to public/assets/character-redesign-archive/<id>/<timestamp>/ before overwriting. redesign-archive.html lists all archived versions with thumbnails + dates. Forward-only (no backfill — noted in wishlist).

items.label: Rebalance report diff view
items.desc: rebalance-diff.html — select two snapshots from rebalance_snapshots/index.json, renders color-coded diff table (green=buff, red=nerf) by hero/companion/tap/utility. Summary KPIs (buffed/nerfed count). Linked from rebalance-report.html.

items.label: Companion catalog page (sortable: name, class, stats, skills)
items.desc: companion-catalog.html — pets, hireables, wild companions, dragon companions. Sortable table, search, filter by kind/class.

items.label: Dungeon catalog page
items.desc: dungeon-catalog.html — card grid with location, stages, mini-boss, rewards. Click to expand details.

items.label: Status effect catalog page
items.desc: status-effect-catalog.html — glyph, color, name, plain description for all STATUS_META entries. Grouped by category (DoT / Control / Buff / Defensive / Debuff / Link).

items.label: Achievement roadmap page
items.desc: achievement-roadmap.html — all achievements grouped by tier (bronze/silver/gold), with unlock conditions. Filter by tier and search.

items.label: Tools-menu landing page (curated)
items.desc: tools.html — curated table of all 30+ tools with tag filters (catalog / devtool / admin / sim / docs), search, and coming-soon rows for M300/M301.

items.label: Live-data + client-side override system across all tools
items.desc: data-source.js ESM module + emit-game-data.cjs prebuild script. data-overrides.html management UI. All M299 catalog pages use live data. Milestone snapshot scaffold added (M309 planned).

items.label: wishlist.html: group by milestone target
items.desc: Done as part of this M292 migration — this section is the result.

items.label: Changelog categorization
items.desc: Bug Fix / Feature / Balance / QoL / Art icons. Flat lists are hard to scan.

items.label: In-game "What's New?" splash on first launch after update
items.desc: Engage players with patch notes; currently external only.

items.label: Per-feature "shipped in M###" badge
items.desc: Visible at the feature itself. Celebrate; drive engagement.

items.label: Public roadmap page
items.desc: Upcoming acts + major features. Manage expectations; hype building. Pulls from this wishlist's milestone groups.

items.label: In-game lore compendium (Claude-authored)
items.desc: Help follow the 5-act narrative. Manual #19: Claude writes the lore — this is Claude's game; user is one of the players.

items.label: Hardcore monument on title screen
items.desc: Display fallen heroes. Manual #13: only render if a hardcore character has fallen. Manual #20: hardcore saves remain loadable as disabled slots so character stats can be compared across playthroughs (Character A from previous run vs Character B from new run). Option to delete the slot.

items.label: Keyboard navigation across screens (arrow + enter)
items.desc: Full Tier A coverage: TitleScreen, CharacterBuilderScreen, LoadGameScreen, SettingsScreen, TownScreen, MapScreen, PartyPanelScreen, DialogScreen, LevelUpScreen, AchievementsScreen, StatsScreen, StatsDashboardScreen, GameMenuScreen. Gold :focus-visible ring site-wide. Tier B (combat): digit keys 1–N for manual-combat action picker; auto-combat has no action buttons so target selection remains mouse/touch-only. Combat keyboard nav intentionally limited to digit shortcuts — adding full arrow-key target selection would require significant combat refactor and is out of scope per user guidance ("do not sacrifice existing UX").

items.label: Colorblind palettes (deuteranopia / protanopia / tritanopia)
items.desc: Rarity colors today are red/blue/yellow/orange — collide for ~8% of players.

items.label: Font-size scaling (Settings → 80%/100%/120%/150%)
items.desc: Fixed 1rem today; mobile readability win.

items.label: Tap-target validation (≥ 44×44px per WCAG)
items.desc: Many tooltip-trigger areas likely undersized on mobile. Audit + fix pass.

items.label: Reduce-motion toggle (kill parallax, screen wipes)
items.desc: Already partial; expand coverage. Manual #14: ensure surfaced in Settings menu — user's OS has reduce-motion enabled and may not know how to override per-app, so the toggle must be in-game-discoverable.

items.label: Subtitle / caption mode for combat log
items.desc: Screen-reader friendly real-time combat narration.

milestones.title: Polish: enchanter, potion belt, toasts, plain-language status

items.label: Enchanter upgrade preview (before/after stats on hover)
items.desc: Half-done per CLAUDE.md; finalize the tooltip.

items.label: Potion belt (combat-quick consumables)
items.desc: Separate from inventory; QoL for healing flow.

items.label: Achievement-unlock toast notifications
items.desc: Celebration moment; currently silent unlock.

items.label: "Patch notes" shortcut in GameMenu
items.desc: Link to latest release summary (in-game splash) with a "full history" link to /assets/changelog.html. Discoverable without leaving the game.

items.label: Plain-language status descriptions
items.desc: Cognitive accessibility; avoid jargon. "Bleeding (3 rounds): loses 8 HP per round" not "Bleed: DoT".

items.label: Boss-specific dialogue preludes (2-3 lines)
items.desc: Sells stakes; cheap content. Could ship in M295 or M307 with cinematic-dialog.

milestones.title: UI batch 2: Party panel + boss splash + zone dropdown

items.label: Unified Spells / Passives / Attributes / Inventory tabbed panel ("Party")
items.desc: Reduce screen count; quick item swaps during skill-point allocation flow. Manual #5: Replace existing Character screen but mark deprecated rather than deleting — user may want to refer back. Keep file in repo with a `// DEPRECATED M294` header and unwire from the menu.

items.label: Rename map "Inventory" button to "Party"
items.desc: Opens unified Party + Inventory panel. Clearer intent; collapses the Inventory + Town notification-bubble overlap.

items.label: MapScreen zone fast-travel as dropdown
items.desc: Reduce horizontal width on phones once 6+ zones are unlocked. Replace tabs with dropdown.

items.label: Boss-intro splash card before boss combat
items.desc: Sells the moment; differentiates from regular fights. Manual #4: long boss names (e.g. Unraveler-of-Mortal-Threads) get cut off on iPhone — splash must wrap or scale-down on narrow viewports. Audit existing combat headers for the same overflow bug.

items.label: Dual-comparison mode in Inventory (rings / offhand)
items.desc: Compare both rings or offhand at once for better multi-slot planning. Manual #2: desktop only — iPhone won't fit, gracefully fall back to single-compare on narrow viewports.

items.label: Notification bubble disambiguation
items.desc: Inventory tab gets bubble for unequipped/upgrades; map Town button shows level-up points only. Manual #1: after level-up in combat the unspent-skill-points bubble persists until visiting Character screen — clear it as soon as auto-allocation has run, or on first map render after combat ends.

items.label: Quick-equip toast on item pickup
items.desc: "Auto-equipped X to Y" or "X is an upgrade for Z — equip?" when loot drops, so the player doesn't have to open inventory after every fight.

items.label: Combat preview tooltip on skill upgrade selection
items.desc: "This upgrade adds N% damage / changes targeting to AoE" — contextual hint when picking talents.

items.label: Scroll-position memory on InventoryScreen tab switch
items.desc: Preserve scroll depth when jumping between characters.

items.label: Status effect duration tooltips
items.desc: Show duration remaining (rounds), not just type. Players can't tell when burns / blocks expire without counting rounds.

items.label: Party screen role icons
items.desc: Tank / DPS / Support / Healer indicators. Manual #3: NO emoji — use SVG / Font Awesome / continue the existing class-icon style. User likes the current generated class icons.
